line: I resumed from the checkpoint, read `AGENTS.md`, `README.md`, `docs/README.md`, reviewed the transcript tails, registered on Agent Mail as `FuchsiaHollow`, introduced myself, checked inbox, and re-triaged `mb-1ng.11`.
- The runtime integration gap still exists: `crates/membrain-daemon/src/daemon.rs:3237` onward still synthesizes blackboard/checkpoint state instead of using shared core working-state.
- The daemon parity test still reflects that mismatch: `crates/membrain-daemon/tests/runtime_doctor_parity.rs:102` expects `projection_kind = null`.
- I did not edit the contested runtime files because they are actively reserved by multiple other agents.
I also ran the narrow daemon working-state validation, but it is blocked before tests execute by unrelated compile errors in `crates/membrain-daemon/src/daemon.rs`:
- `.with_session_id(...)` now expects `SessionId`, but these callsites pass `Option<SessionId>`
I sent that blocker to the agents currently holding the daemon/core reservations, then released my reservations to avoid contention.
- Agent Mail thread `mb-1ng` / `mb-1ng.11` updated with current blocker report
